text: BREAKING: Qatari LNG tanker Al Kharaitiyat has crossed the Strait of Hormuz heading to Pakistan's Port Qasim — first vessel to transit since the war began 69 days ago. Iran approved passage as 'confidence-building measure' amid deal negotiations. Bloomberg and CNBC confirm. Could signal beginning of blockade loosening.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Bloomberg and CNBC with AIS tracking data.

text: ASSESSMENT: Iran's dual-track response — allowing Qatari tanker through Hormuz while simultaneously launching drones at UAE/Kuwait/Qatar — signals selective pressure. Tehran rewarding Qatar (mediator) while punishing sanctions-enforcers. Mojtaba Khamenei's 'guiding measures' meeting with military chief suggests hardline faction retains veto on deal terms.
verificationNote: Analysis based on confirmed reports from Al Jazeera, Gulf News, Fortune, and Press TV.

text: LEBANON CARNAGE: 39 killed in Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon today — most intense bombardment since April 17 ceasefire. Strikes hit Al-Sarirah (Jezzine), Al-Sama'iyah and Bedyas (Tyre), car on Saadiyat highway. IDF killed 10 Hezbollah, struck 40 infrastructure sites. 2,820+ total killed since March 2. Peace talks still scheduled May 14-15 in Washington.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Euronews and The National with casualty figures from Lebanese Health Ministry.

text: GULF DRONE ATTACKS: Iran launched coordinated drone attacks on 3 Gulf states simultaneously. UAE intercepted 2 drones (total war intercepts: 551 BMs, 29 CMs, 2,265 drones). Kuwait neutralized hostile drones at dawn. Drone hit cargo ship 23nm NE of Doha causing fire. IRGC warned sanctions-enforcing countries 'will face problems' in Hormuz.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Gulf News (UAE), Fortune (all three), and Times of Israel.

text: IRAN RESPONSE: Iran sent reply to US 14-point proposal via Pakistani mediators. Key demands: end war on ALL fronts (including Lebanon), shipping security guarantee. Iran rejects enrichment moratorium as written. Netanyahu on CBS 60 Minutes: 'You go in, and you take it out' — referring to 970 lbs of near-bomb-grade uranium. Deal gap remains wide.
verificationNote: Iran response confirmed by Al Jazeera and CNBC. Netanyahu interview confirmed by CBS News.

text: NAVAL UPDATE: Iran seized Barbados-flagged tanker Ocean Koi in Gulf of Oman May 8. US disabled 2 Iranian tankers breaching blockade. Mokhber (Khamenei adviser) declared Hormuz 'equivalent to atomic bomb.' US has 70+ tankers blocked from Iranian ports, 166M+ barrels capacity. 20+ warships enforcing dual blockade. Project Freedom paused since May 6.
verificationNote: Tanker seizure confirmed by Al Jazeera. Mokhber quote confirmed by Al Jazeera and Times of Israel.

text: MARKETS: S&P 500 closed at 7,399 (new ATH, +0.8%). Nasdaq 26,247 (ATH, +1.71%). Dow 49,609. Sixth straight winning week. Energy sector best-performing in 2026 (+25%). Defense ETF ITA +66% YoY. Gold ~$4,722/oz. April payrolls +115K beat 65K forecast. Brent $101.00 (+26.6%), WTI $95.42 (+26.4%). AAA gas $4.52 (+48.2%).
verificationNote: Market data confirmed by TheStreet, BBN Times, and Asset Whisper.

text: DIPLOMACY TRACKER: Rubio met Pope Leo XIV at Vatican (May 7, olive wood pen gift). Rubio-Witkoff met Qatari PM in Miami (May 9). VP Vance met Qatari PM at White House (May 8). Qatar emerging as 2nd mediator alongside Pakistan using IRGC back channels. Trump-Xi summit in Beijing May 14-15 — pressure to resolve Iran war before visit.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Vatican News (Pope meeting), Axios (Miami meeting), CBS (Vance meeting).
